Kyu Na Roye Sajjad- Why Did Imam Sajjad Not Cry
english translation text: Allah mujhe lashkar e mehdi se mila deO Allah! Help me to join the army of Imam Mahdi (a.s)English Transliteration

O Allah! Help me to join the army of Imam Mahdi (a.s),
I hope my Master (a.s.) doesn’t have to ask for a helper

urdu transliteration text:
nazro ko meri layake didar bana deparda jo pada he meri ankho pe utha dehadi e zama karo pe purnur dikha de
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Make eyes worthy of seeing my him (a.s.),
Lift the veil from my so I can see him,
Show me the radiant face of the guide of this time.

O Allah! Help me to join the army of Imam Mahdi (a.s),
I hope my Master (a.s.) doesn’t have to ask for a helper

May it be in my destiny to serve him
Give me the opportunity to be with him
